parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ sender: { email: $env.MAIL_FROM, name: "Westrom Group" }, to: [{ email: $env.PARSE_ADDRESS }], subject: "New Lead - Free Rental Analysis", textContent: $('CRM API attempt (mapped)').first().json.email_text }) }}

nodes.name: Fallback: email-parse path
nodes.notes: LeadSimple per-Source parse address via Brevo HTTP API (Railway blocks SMTP). Plain text, one field per line (G-2).

nodes.name: Notify Jon + Ashley + Youssef
nodes.notes: FR-6: within 60s. Tertiary delivery path (full lead body). Fails loud -> WF-3 error alert.

parameters.jsonBody:
={{ (function(){ const p = $json.payload; const nm = (p.name || "").trim(); const greeting = nm ? ("Hi " + nm + ",") : "Hi,"; const guideUrl = "https://wgcassetguide.com/how-to-hire-the-best-property-manager.pdf"; const html = "

" + greeting + "

Thank you for requesting your free rental analysis from Westrom Group.

Your guide, How to Hire the Best Property Manager for You, is ready.

Download the guide

If you have any questions, just reply to this email.

— The Westrom Group Team

"; const text = greeting + " Thank you for requesting your free rental analysis from Westrom Group. Your guide: How to Hire the Best Property Manager for You Download the guide: " + guideUrl + " If you have any questions, just reply to this email. — The Westrom Group Team"; return JSON.stringify({ sender: { email: $env.MAIL_FROM, name: "Westrom Group" }, to: [{ email: p.email }], subject: "Your free guide: How to Hire the Best Property Manager", htmlContent: html, textContent: text }); })() }}

nodes.name: Send guide email (Brevo)
nodes.notes: Fulfills the widget success-card promise (ebook_opt_in=true) via Brevo HTTP API (Railway blocks SMTP). Guide URL hardcoded (public asset, not a secret) to avoid a two-instance env var change. Best-effort: failure does not block the CRM/notify chain.
